description: This file implements a repository module for managing 'personas' and their versions in a database, including functions for creation, retrieval, updating, and version management, with environment-based configuration checks.

methods.name: isDbConfigured
methods.description: Checks if database connection environment variables are set.

methods.name: ensureDbConfigured
methods.description: Throws an error if database is not configured.

methods.name: createPersona
methods.description: Creates a new persona record, optionally with an initial JSON version.

methods.name: getPersonaById
methods.description: Fetches a persona record by its ID.

methods.name: updatePersona
methods.description: Updates persona metadata such as title.

methods.name: createPersonaVersion
methods.description: Creates a new version record for a persona.

methods.name: listPersonaVersions
methods.description: Lists all versions of a persona in ascending order.

methods.name: getLatestPersonaVersion
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent version of a persona.
